reason: Refactoring the central TUI application scaffold to under 500 LOC involves migrating extensive UI logic and event handling to sub-modules, which exceeds the 400-line modification threshold.
suggestions: INFRA-114-A: Migrate Prompt and history logic from app.py to tui/prompts.py
INFRA-114-B: Migrate Chat orchestration and message processing to tui/chat.py
INFRA-114-C: Final refactor of app.py into a pure UI scaffold and layout definition
